name: workflowy-mcp
description: Search, read, create, and organize Workflowy nodes. Full read/write access with breadcrumb context, completion filtering, and smart caching.
long_description:
A full-featured Workflowy MCP server with read and write access to your Workflowy account.

**Key features:**

- **Search with breadcrumb paths** — search results include the full ancestor path for each node, so you can see where things are in your hierarchy
- **Hierarchical completion filtering** — understands that completing a parent implicitly completes its children, and filters accordingly
- **Smart caching** — caches exports to respect Workflowy's rate limits, automatically invalidates on writes
- **Layout modes** — supports bullets, todos, headings (h1–h3), code blocks, and quote blocks
- **System targets** — work with home, inbox, and user shortcuts by name instead of IDs
- **Full CRUD** — create, read, update, delete, move, complete, and uncomplete nodes

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Search nodes by keyword across name and note fields

tools.name: get_node
tools.description: Get full details of a node by ID

tools.name: list_children
tools.description: List child nodes of a parent, sorted by priority

tools.name: move_node
tools.description: Move a node to a different parent

tools.name: uncomplete_node
tools.description: Mark a node as not completed

tools.name: list_targets
tools.description: List system locations (home/inbox) and user shortcuts
